ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the service station */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the service station */,
  "addr1" TEXT /* Primary address of the station */,
  "addr2" TEXT /* Secondary address or location details */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the service station is located */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the service station */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the service station */,
  "has_restaurant" INTEGER /* Whether the service station has a restaurant */,
  "has_toilet" INTEGER /* Whether the service station has a toilet */,
  "has_wifi" INTEGER /* Whether the service station has WiFi */,
  "has_car_wash" INTEGER /* Whether the service station has a car wash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_stations_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_stations_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel price entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service station to which the price is linked */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the fuel */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the price (e.g., up, down) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the price was last updated */,
  "updater" TEXT /* Username of the person who updated the price */,
  "low_price_alert" INTEGER /* Whether a low price alert is set for this fuel price */,
  "high_price_alert" INTEGER /* Whether a high price alert is set for this fuel price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_prices_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_prices_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES service_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consumer, admin, station owner) */,
  "name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service station associated with the alert */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type associated with the alert */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price for the user to be alerted at */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES service_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price trend record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service station related to the trend */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type related to the trend */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the fuel at the time of recording */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES service_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel brand */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the brand's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* First name of the administrator */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Last name of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
